_source: APPROXIMATE seeded snapshot. Numbers (intelligence_index, speed_tps, prices) are hand-tuned placeholders, NOT live measurements. Refresh from artificialanalysis.ai via `syntra catalog refresh` for current numbers. The capability TAGS and role_candidates lists are editorial and stay yours.
_note: intelligence_index is AA-style 0-100. speed_tps is approximate output tokens/sec. Prices are USD per 1M tokens. specialties are capability tags used by the router.

models.notes: Frontier planning and architectural reasoning. Use sparingly for decomposition and final review.
Strong planner one tier below 4.7.
Top-tier planning at smaller context window than 4.7.
Faster Opus variant. Good when planner latency matters.
Faster Opus 4.6 variant.
Sonnet 4.6: strong coding executor with agentic loop polish.
DeepSeek V4 Pro: excellent quality-per-dollar all-rounder. Strong default executor.
Very fast and very cheap. Good for bulk edits and quick reviews.
Gemini 3.1 Pro preview. Largest context window in the catalog.
Fast long-context executor. [interim: intelligence_index corrected old-scale→AA-v4 (research, MEDIUM confidence); refresh will finalize]
MiniMax M2. Solid mid-tier coding.
Excellent coding executor. Strong tool-use. Sweet spot for most edit tasks. [interim: intelligence_index corrected old-scale→AA-v4 (research, MEDIUM confidence); refresh will finalize]
Fast and cheap. Good for quick edits, lint fixes, simple reviews.
Strong all-rounder. Cheaper than Opus, slower than Haiku.
Cheap fast executor. Good for bulk code generation.
Very cheap classifier / quick reviewer. Not for complex reasoning.
Massive context window. Best for whole-repo analysis tasks.
Fast cheap long-context. Good repo-scan executor.
Excellent cost-to-intelligence ratio. Strong code execution.
Deep reasoning at low cost. Slow due to thinking tokens.
Specialized coder. Strong on agentic coding benchmarks.
Open-weights MoE. Competitive with frontier models on agentic tasks.
Strong reasoning. Limited tool-use ecosystem.
Cheap open-weights baseline. Use for high-volume cheap work.
Solid European option. Mid-tier intelligence and cost.
